title: Minecraft: Adventure Awakens {Discontinued}
description: This modpack stores a bunch of Quality of life mods and other mods that just improve the quality of the game
body:
The Adventure Awakens Modpack aims to provide an **_Awesome Cinimiatic exprenece for content creators and your friends _**. I'm still resurching mods for this modpack and it could still receive updates for a very long time. I also look to improve my own experience of the Vanilla game and if I find a cool mod I'll put it in here if not. I won't update it. 

This is built for a cinimatic feel and ease of use in mind. Which would mean that there is Quality of life mods included such as **Tree falling** and others. - You are also allowed to add any mods yourself as well.

If you have any suggustions for the modpack. Please join my discord server! 

This could be a heavy modpack for your machine, I specifically chose fabric becuase it's known to be more "light weight". Please make sure you are on the latest version of this modpack. I might've found errors or add added more fetures!

**_I did NOT make any of the code for this modpack, Please avoid harrassing me with errors for a specific mod. Try some trubbleshooting yourself before you ask. Thank you._**


<details>
<summary>Spoil the fun </summary>
This modpack includes:

- 3D-Skin Layers
- Antique Atlas
- AppleSkin
- BiomesOPlenty
- ClientHarvest
- Connectible Chains
- Day Counter
- Double Doors
- Dynamic Lights
- EMF/ETF
- EntityCulling
- Essentials
- Explorify
- Flashback
- Flashlight
- Freecam
- Geophilic
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris
- Iron Chests
- Items Displayed
- Jump Over Fences
- Mod Menu'More Chest Variants
- More Chest Variants - Biomes O' Plenty
- NotEnoughAnimations
- Ore Haevester

and so much more!
</details>
